name: quiz-generator-ai
description: Quiz generation and assessment by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: generate_quiz
tools.description: Generate a quiz from provided content text.

tools.name: validate_answers
tools.description: Validate submitted answers against correct answers and return scoring.

tools.name: generate_flashcards
tools.description: Generate flashcards (front/back pairs) from content for study purposes.

tools.name: assess_difficulty
tools.description: Assess the difficulty level of content for quiz/study purposes.
